themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents capable of performing research tasks autonomously or semi-autonomously, including their frameworks, infrastructure, and applications.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers with writing, reviewing, and securing code, including specific models and their security implications.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles detailing AI's capability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts, research papers, or video content, into concise summaries and insights.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Content exploring AI's role in aiding UX/UI design processes, including UI generation, prototyping, and generating design system components.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Articles covering how AI is used to understand consumer behavior, preferences, and sentiment, often through analysis of surveys and interactions.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Discussions on AI-powered tools designed to streamline or enhance various aspects of research, from literature reviews to data analysis.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Content on how AI is being applied to product development workflows, including strategy, conflict identification, and market research.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles focusing on the use of AI chatbots for research purposes, including shopping assistance, information gathering, and comparing AI models.

themes.name: AI tool evaluation
themes.description: Content related to the comparison, review, and assessment of various AI tools and platforms for specific research or development tasks.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Articles addressing the use of AI to analyze and understand user sentiment from feedback, reviews, and online discussions.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
